metadata.name: Adjust Public Transit Schedule for Holiday

description: For an upcoming public holiday, an operator needs to switch the entire bus and train network to a 'Sunday' service schedule.

nodes.task_description: Select the date of the upcoming public holiday in the transit scheduling system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the target date.

nodes.task_description: Apply the 'Sunday/Holiday' service template to all transit routes for the selected date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully applies the new schedule across the network.

nodes.task_description: Publish a notification about the holiday service changes on the transit website and app.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs the public of the upcoming schedule change.
